text: Hey Florian, Kofana, listen here. We help companies listen to all of their customers and today I'll walk you through what's new on our platform
The analysis page is the most important page on this. I'm excited to show you our next generation
We rebuilt the analysis engine to focus on relevance and trust
The findings are now much more targeted life updating and fully explainable
Customers choose listen for our millions of real verified respondents today
We're going one step further with quality guard
Listen now analyze every response and automatically removes any natural signs of low effort
misrepresentation AI use or other indicators
If you want to be in the details of the exact participant mix, you can now set up quota requirements for your recruits
For example here. We require at least 50, but at most 90 respondents to be HPT users
Finally my favorite feature study advisor
Listen now automatically detects common setup issues like confusing questions or missing stimuli and flags them to you
This helps you follow the best practices in research and launch with confidence
Try the features at listenlabs.ai and stay tuned for more updates
